summary: Utility dialect that renders an existing item's form view to a PNG thumbnail and uploads it. Not a content-authoring target.
in_scope: Rendering the form view of a given item (by item id; task + language resolved from it) to an image
Cropping the capture to a fixed aspect (top crop) or an explicit { x, y, width, height }
Uploading the PNG to an item-derived Storage path and returning its public URL + base64
out_of_scope: Authoring any domain content (assessments, spreadsheets, charts, diagrams, boards, data) — L0013 only photographs an item's output
Editing or recompiling the target item — it is rendered read-only
Interactive UI — the output is a static image
Cross-language composition — L0013 takes an item reference, it does not import another dialect's functions
